creator: freebsd@wizdom.org.uk
text:
when trying to get this port to upgrade / build I get:

cd /usr/ports/lang/gcc34/
-su-2.05b# make
===>  Building for gcc-3.4.6_1,1
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/libiberty'
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/libiberty/testsuite'
gmake[2]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/libiberty/testsuite'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/libiberty'
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/intl'
gmake[1]: Nothing to be done for `all'.
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/intl'
Bootstrapping the compiler
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/gcc'
gmake CC=" stage1/xgcc -Bstage1/ -B/usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd4.11/bin/" CC_FOR_BUILD=" stage1/xgcc -Bstage1/ -B/usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd4.11/bin/" \
                 STAGE_PREFIX=stage1/ \
                 ADAFLAGS="" CFLAGS="-g -O2" LDFLAGS="" WARN_CFLAGS="\$(GCC_WARN_CFLAGS)" STRICT_WARN="-pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wold-style-definition " libdir=/usr/local/lib/gcc/i386-portbld-freebsd4.11/3.4.6 LANGUAGES="c gcov gcov-dump c++ f77 objc" MAKEINFO="makeinfo --no-split" MAKEINFOFLAGS="--no-split" MAKEOVERRIDES= OUTPUT_OPTION="-o \$@" \
                 CFLAGS="-g -O2" WERROR=""
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/gcc'
./gengtype
././..//gcc-3.4.6/gcc/input.h:27: parse error, expecting `GTY_TOKEN'
gmake[2]: *** [s-gtype] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/gcc'
gmake[1]: *** [stage2_build] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc34/work/build/gcc'
gmake: *** [bootstrap-lean] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/gcc34.

Now this also stops gnutls from upgrading.
